title: Can't access to GPU using podman compose
body:
### Issue Description

Hello,

as we know the deploy resources (deploy.resources.reservations.devices) not are working with podman compose as described in the next issue:
[Describe your issue](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/19338#issuecomment-1676175429)

so this is the solution until now:
ollama:
    image: ollama/ollama:latest
    container_name: ollama
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "11434:11434"
    volumes:
      - ollama_data:/root/.ollama
    # ── GPU passthrough (NVIDIA) — comment out for CPU-only ──
    devices:
      - nvidia.com/gpu=all
    healthcheck:
      <<: *hc-defaults
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:11434/api/tags"]

but now is giving this error when we are creating the container
- Container ollama                    Creating                                                                    0.2s
Error response from daemon: container create: stat nvidia.com/gpu=all: no such file or directory

best regards

comments.body: I was not aware that `deploy.resources.reservations.devices` was not working properly; the issue you're linking to is closed. Can you provide more details?

With this code
```
  ollama-gpu:
    image: ollama/ollama:latest
    container_name: ollama
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "11434:11434"
    volumes:
      - ollama_data:/root/.ollama
    devices:
      - "nvidia.com/gpu=all"
```
we get
```
[+] Running 3/4
 ✔ Network dlmcp_default          Created                                                                                                                              0.0s 
 ✔ Volume "dlmcp_openwebui_data"  Created                                                                                                                              0.0s 
 ✔ Volume "dlmcp_ollama_data"     Created                                                                                                                              0.0s 
 - Container ollama               Creating                                                                                                                             0.2s 
Error response from daemon: container create: stat nvidia.com/gpu=all: no such file or directory
```

but with this, works normally
`podman run -d --pod ai-stack --name ollama --security-opt label=disable --device nvidia.com/gpu=all -v ollama_data:/root/.ollama ollama/ollama:latest`

The issue linked before is closed but as you can see without proper solution, until now we can made a work around using devices - "nvidia.com/gpu=all" but not works anymore...

podman version 5.7.1
Versão WSL: 2.7.0.0
Versão do kernel: 6.6.114.1-1
Versão WSLg: 1.0.71
Versão MSRDC: 1.2.6676
Versão direct3D: 1.611.1-81528511
Versão DXCore: 10.0.26100.1-240331-1435.ge-release
Versão do Windows: 10.0.26200.8037

@mheon can you try on your side to see the results?

Sorry, I just created this issue --> https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28436

I think the two issues are related

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.
